name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: LoanStar Title Loans provides fast cash loans secured by vehicle titles, with loans up to $10,000 available at multiple Texas locations.
description_long:
LoanStar Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a title loan provider serving the Fort Worth, Texas area and surrounding regions. The company specializes in auto title loans, allowing borrowers to leverage their vehicle's equity to access emergency cash quickly.

The company offers car title loans (also called auto title loans) with loan amounts up to $10,000. Borrowers need only three items to qualify: their vehicle, a photo ID, and a clear vehicle title. The Fort Worth location at 8304 Camp Bowie operates Monday-Friday 10 AM-6 PM and Saturday 9 AM-2 PM. LoanStar accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union for loan repayment.

LoanStar distinguishes itself through its multi-location presence in the Texas market, with at least six locations across Fort Worth, Haltom City, Richland Hills, and Burleson. The company provides fee schedules and disclosure documents for different loan amounts ($600, $1,200, and $2,000) in both multiple and single installment formats, demonstrating transparency about costs. They maintain licensing and provide OCCC (Office of Consumer Credit Commissioner) notices.

As a title loan provider, LoanStar serves consumers needing immediate cash but should be approached cautiously. Title loans carry inherent risks including potential vehicle loss if loans cannot be repaid. While the company offers legitimate emergency funding, borrowers should carefully review fee schedules and understand the terms before proceeding, as title loans typically involve higher costs than traditional lending products.
pros: Loans up to $10,000 available, larger than typical payday loans
Quick qualification requiring only vehicle, photo ID, and clear title
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Six locations across Fort Worth and surrounding Texas cities for convenience
Published fee schedules and disclosure documents for transparency on costs
Extended operating hours including Saturday availability
25+ years in business since 1990, established company
cons: Title loans risk vehicle repossession if borrower cannot repay
Fee schedules visible on website but actual APR/total cost not prominently disclosed in provided content
Limited transparency about approval odds and actual typical loan terms on main location page
Requires clear vehicle title, excluding those with outstanding liens or title issues
best_for: Vehicle owners with clear titles needing $1,000+ in emergency cash quickly
Borrowers unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit-based products
Texas residents in Fort Worth area seeking same-day or next-day funding
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for Texas vehicle owners with clear titles who need $1,000-$10,000 in emergency cash and can qualify through traditional lending channels. The primary caveat is that title loans carry significant risk of vehicle loss if the borrower defaults, and borrowers must carefully review fee schedules and total repayment obligations before committing.
services: Car title loans (secured by vehicle equity)
In-person loan processing at physical locations
Payment acceptance via cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Photo ID and vehicle title verification
